name: Hot Tomato Relish (Gujarati Kasundi)
recipeIngredient: 5 medium Ripe tomatoes, blanched and peeled, chopped
recipeInstructions:
This very popular relish is from Gujarat in western India. It makes a wonderful dipping sauce for finger foods.
1. Heat oil in a medium-size skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add mustard seeds and garlic. Cook, stirring, until the mixture starts to brown, about 4 minutes.
3. Add turmeric, cayenne, salt, and tomatoes. Stir and cook for 2 minutes.
4. Add vinegar and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer until thick, about 10 minutes.
6. Spoon into clean jars and seal.
Makes 3/4 cup.
Note: Stays fresh for several weeks in a covered jar in the refrigerator.
